title: The Three-Qubit Phase-Flip Code
description: Learn how to protect quantum information against phase (Z) errors using the Hadamard-conjugate of the bit-flip code.
learningObjectives: Understand phase errors and their effect on quantum states
Derive the phase-flip code from the bit-flip code
Implement encoding and syndrome measurement for Z errors
Recognize the duality between X and Z error correction
Understand why both codes are needed for full protection
